scripts.build:production: ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 SITE_ENV=production ENABLE_INDEXING=true npm run build:netlify
scripts.build:preview: ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 SITE_ENV=deploy-preview ENABLE_INDEXING=false X_ROBOTS_TAG='noindex, nofollow' npm run build:netlify
scripts.validate:local:production: ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 npm run check && npm run build:production && npm run verify:production
scripts.validate:local:preview: npm run build:preview && npm run verify:preview
scripts.validate:local: npm run validate:local:production && npm run validate:local:preview
